cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic and personalize content. By clicking "Accept all", you consent to the use of all cookies.
cookie.message_short: We use cookies to improve your experience.
cookie.intro: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site. You can choose which categories of cookies you wish to allow.
cookie.intro_short: Choose which categories of cookies you wish to allow.
cookie.essential_desc: Required for the site to function.
cookie.analytics_desc: Help us understand how visitors use our site.
cookie.preference_desc_long: Remember your choices and personalize your experience.
cookie.essential_cant_disable: Required for the site to function. They cannot be disabled.
cookie.marketing_desc_full: Used to display relevant ads (currently not used).

cookie.more_info_desc: To learn more about our use of cookies and your rights, see our Privacy Policy.

home.title: Vol d'Histoire - Explore Military Aviation
home.hero_desc: Explore the evolution of fighter aircraft through the decades, from the first jets to 5th generation stealth fighters.
home.features_desc: Discover our platform designed for military aviation enthusiasts, with modern tools and detailed data.
home.feature_1_desc: Each aircraft has a comprehensive profile: technical specs, armament, onboard technologies and engagement history.
home.feature_2_desc: Navigate through history with our interactive timeline. Filter by generation and explore each decade.
home.feature_3_desc: Build your collection of favorite aircraft, accessible from any device thanks to account sync.
home.feature_4_desc: Find exactly what you're looking for with filters by country, generation, mission type and much more.
home.hangar_desc: Browse our entire collection of fighter aircraft. Search, filter and explore each aircraft through an interface designed for enthusiasts.
home.sf_country_desc: France, USA, Russia, China and many more countries represented
home.sf_view_desc: Switch between two display modes according to your preference
home.cta_desc: Join our community of aviation enthusiasts and discover hundreds of historic aircraft
home.hero_desc_full: Explore our exclusive collection of historic fighter aircraft and dive into the fascinating technical evolution of military aviation, from early jets to 5th generation stealth fighters.
home.features_desc_full: Discover all the features that make our platform unique
home.feat_catalog_desc: Browse a complete collection of fighter aircraft with detailed specifications and precise technical data sheets.
home.feat_data_desc: Access detailed characteristics: speed, armament, onboard technologies, weapons and performance.
home.feat_timeline_desc: Travel through time with our interactive timeline tracing the evolution of military aviation.
home.feat_wars_desc: Discover the wars and conflicts in which these aircraft were engaged, with detailed historical context.
home.feat_search_desc: Instantly find any aircraft with real-time search and advanced filters (country, generation, type).
home.feat_nations_desc: Explore aircraft from all nations and discover the different design schools and military philosophies.
home.feat_favorites_desc: Save your favorite aircraft and access your personal collection anytime from your account.
home.feat_account_desc: Create your account and access your personal space: profile, security, favorites and, for editors, adding entries.
home.showcase_desc: Discover some of the most iconic aircraft in our collection
home.rafale_desc: Versatile French multirole fighter, capable of operating from aircraft carriers and excelling in air superiority and precision strikes.
home.f22_desc: The first 5th-generation stealth fighter, dominating air superiority through stealth, supercruise, and exceptional agility.
home.mig29_desc: A formidable Soviet multirole fighter in close combat, exported worldwide and battle-proven in numerous conflicts.
home.account_desc: Create your account and enjoy exclusive features based on your role
home.account_favs_desc: Build your own aircraft collection and find your favorites in one click from any device.
home.account_access: Access from your dedicated personal space
home.roles_desc: Three access levels for fine-grained permission management. Each role has specific capabilities.
home.timeline_desc: Travel through over 75 years of aeronautical innovation. Our interactive timeline lets you explore each generation of fighters.
home.timeline_feat_3: Visualization of technical evolution from generation to generation
home.hangar_search_desc: The Hangar features powerful search and sorting tools to browse the collection in seconds.
home.search_realtime_desc: Type an aircraft name to filter the list instantly
home.cta_desc_full: Join our community of aviation enthusiasts and discover hundreds of historic aircraft
home.favs_add_remove: Add / remove from each aircraft's page

favorites.auth_desc: This area requires operator authentication. Log in to access your favorites collection and save your preferred aircraft.
favorites.empty_desc: Explore the hangar and add aircraft to your favorites by clicking the icon

timeline.title: Military Aviation Timeline | Vol d'Histoire
timeline.hero_desc: 75 years of strategic innovation. From the first Cold War jets to 5th generation stealth fighters — explore every decade.
timeline.empty_desc: No aircraft matches the active filters
timeline.era_1940_desc: The era of the first military jet engines, transitioning from propellers.
timeline.era_1950_desc: The supersonic arms race, rise of the East-West blocs.
timeline.era_1960_desc: Mach 2+, guided missiles — dogfight doctrine evolves radically.
timeline.era_1970_desc: First 3rd generation fighters with pulse-Doppler radar and digital avionics.
timeline.era_1980_desc: Digital avionics, fly-by-wire, BVR missiles — warfare goes electronic.
timeline.era_1990_desc: Transition to asymmetric conflicts, maturity of the 4th generation.
timeline.era_2000_desc: 5th generation — data fusion, active stealth, supercruise.
timeline.era_2010_desc: Network integration, onboard AI — towards the 6th generation.
timeline.era_2020_desc: Autonomous systems, combat drones, human-machine hybridization.
timeline.hero_desc_full: 75 years of strategic innovation. From the first Cold War jets to 5th generation stealth fighters.

about.title: About | Vol d'Histoire
about.hero_desc: Preserving and sharing military aviation history for future generations.
about.mission_p1: Vol d'Histoire is an educational platform dedicated to preserving and showcasing the heritage of world military aviation. From early Great War aircraft to fifth-generation stealth fighters, we document each machine with rigor and passion.
about.mission_p2: Our ambition is to make history accessible to everyone: enthusiasts, students, historians or simply curious minds. Each technical sheet is the result of thorough research, enriched by verified primary and secondary sources.
about.approach_p1: Each aircraft listed on Vol d'Histoire features a comprehensive sheet including its technical characteristics, development context, conflicts in which it was engaged, and its legacy in aviation history.
about.approach_p2: We prioritize factual accuracy, content accessibility and an immersive user experience that recreates the atmosphere of the cockpit and operations room.
about.values_desc: The founding principles that drive our daily work
about.value_precision_desc: Every technical data point is verified and sourced. We only publish what we can confirm with certainty.
about.value_pedagogy_desc: We make technical information understandable and accessible, without ever sacrificing scientific rigor.
about.value_passion_desc: Driven by the same fascination for aviation, we do everything we can to share this passion with our community.
about.value_openness_desc: The platform is open to all, free and contributive. Every member can enrich the database.
about.tech_desc: Vol d'Histoire relies on modern web technologies ensuring performance, security and accessibility.
about.cta_desc: Contribute to preserving military aviation history. Every passion counts.
about.value_pedagogy_desc_full: History should be accessible to everyone. We write with clarity to reach both experts and newcomers.
about.value_passion_desc_full: Behind every entry is an enthusiast. Our passion for military aviation is our driving force.
about.value_access_desc: Knowledge should have no barriers. Our platform is free, open and contributive.
about.project_research_desc: Collection of technical, historical and iconographic data on each aircraft.
about.project_dev_desc: Design and development of the web platform with modern technologies.
about.project_launch_desc: Platform launch with an initial collection of aircraft.
about.project_community_desc: Opening to contributions and community development.
about.project_phase1_desc: Faced with the lack of centralized and accessible resources on military aviation, the Vol d'Histoire project was born from the desire to create a modern and interactive encyclopedia.
about.project_phase2_desc: Collection and verification of technical data for over 40 aircraft covering 5 generations and 8 nations.
about.project_phase3_desc: Launch of Vol d'Histoire with the Hangar, interactive Timeline and favorites system.
about.project_phase4_desc: Continuous catalog enrichment, addition of new nations and development of community features.
about.community_desc: Create your account to save your favorite aircraft and access all platform features.

support.guide_security_desc: Understand how we protect your data and what your rights are under the GDPR.
